You can transfer your silver for summon but in the most favorable scenario which is 1SSR/30 considering you only get the limited each time, you would need 48000 Silver for +4
Is it even possible as F2P to get +4 or (just for the example) +12 units ?

THx in advance
The answer to this question is look into what you already have in your toybox. At e1-e0. Or get ready to save for your entire life.
The big thing is... dupes are optional. Whether that deters you or not is up to you.

It is very possible, specially as a beginner 
However over time it gets increasingly hard to have certain units with multiple copies

Luckily most dont really benefit from having lots of dupes
Ignore +4. Aim for E3 as f2p.

Playing this game for several months. I've got quite a fee limiteds at e3. And a lot of standards at +4.

Hell the starting cast are almost at +12

There's a handful of units that actually need +4 and none that actually require +12
E2-E3 is the breaking point for most characters 

But yes, you can absolutely get OE for a limited character as f2p
+12 not so much, unless you're posses an unreasonable level of dedication towards a certain unit
Much easier with standard units due to the Origin of Time

Again as i say. The gap between f2p and p2w is large in this game.

But at the same time... eh.

The game, and even hyperoptimizing for the hardest content... is surprisingly a familiar and fun experience for both.
